text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's so nice to be back! The lodging is as
nice as ever. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Curren Chan's second summer camp to
improve her skills. She's fresh out of a tough time
and has a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Your love is what got me through it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Your love is what got me through it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha. But it's true, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...It's not long until the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's get through this summer and come out way
stronger! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A truly hot summer camp is about to begin!
